name: Gong
description: Monitor Gong revenue intelligence platform for call recording access and data retention compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Gong at https://app.gong.io
2. Go to Settings → Ecosystem → API
3. Generate API credentials (access key + secret)
4. Base64 encode 'access_key:access_key_secret'
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'access_key:access_key_secret'. Found in Gong Settings → Ecosystem → API. Command: echo -n 'access_key:access_key_secret' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Gong users with access to call recordings and revenue intelligence

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Gong account settings manage call recording retention and access appropriately
